description: You are a marine robotics engineer preparing a Webots simulation for a BlueROV2-class underwater vehicle. Fix the simulation physics by setting the 'ocean' Fluid node density to 1025.0 kg/m³ and the 'ROV_VEHICLE' mass to 11.5 kg. Configure the robot's physics to include linear and angular damping of 0.5. Ensure the WorldInfo gravity remains 9.81 and save the world to /home/ga/Desktop/rov_configured.wbt.
